productDisplayName: Nike Men Chroma Thong II Black Flip Flops
description: flip flops have been in vogue since time immemorial. The nike Chroma Thong 11 will add a splash of colour to your feet, transporting you to a world of absolute comfort and delight. They have a good grip, are comfortable, and can be worn with almost any casual outfit.Warranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount)  UpperBroad straps for improved comfortSynthetic straps and fabric toe separator for a soft feelFabric lining inside the straps for enhanced comfortLogo on strapStitched detailing on straps and foot-bed for added styleMidsoleFoam foot-bed with synthetic upper layer for all day comfortLogo on heelStitched detailing on the peripheryThong construction to hold the forefoot in placeOutsoleTPU outsole with a herringbone pattern for maximum grip and tractionWarranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount)Flip flop careRemove dust and dirt with damp clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
